goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve unusual food and should be in the centre. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food. Make sure you get postcode, address, and phone number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the restaurant by 07:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for a restaurant that serves unusual food in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, I don't have any places that offer unusual food in the centre of town. Can I try a different area or type of cuisine for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What moderately priced restaurants are there?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Oak Bistro is an excellent moderately priced restaurant located at 6 Lensfield Road.  Can I book a table for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, that would be great. Please book that for me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Certainly. I just need to know the number of guests and the date and time that you would like me to book it for.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No but could I get the postcode, address, and phone number?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, the address is 6 Lensfield Road, cb21eg.  You can reach the Oak Bistro at 01223323361.  Is there anything else I can assist you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: i would like  a place to go in the same area as the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: What type of attraction are you looking for?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for a museum. Which one is your favorite?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I would recommend the primavera, located at 10 king s parade. There is no entrance fee. Do you need anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need the postcode for the museum also. And I need to book a taxi from The Oak Bistro to the Primavera, I'd like to leave the restaurant by 07:45.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I will work on getting this booked for you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay did you book it? I need the contact number and car type.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The post code for the museum is cb21sj.  Please give me a moment to complete your taxi booking.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay. Once you're done, can I have the contact number and car type?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes of course, Please give me a few moments as I get this information.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Oh wait, before you book that. I am rethinking my restaurant choice. I need British food. Does Oak Bistro serve British food?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, the Oak Bistro serves British Food.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Perfect, I'd love to have a British breakfast. Have you been able to book the taxi yet?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, it's complete. The car type is a red Audi and contact number is 07084740824.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for all your help. Have a great day!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are welcome!  I hope you enjoy your visit to Cambridge!  Please call us again if we can help you further.

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of concerthall and should be in the centre. Make sure you get entrance fee. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should be in the moderate price range. Make sure you get postcode. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the attraction by 04:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you tell me if there's a concerthall in the city center?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There's a place called the Man on the Moon that is a great concert hall. They are located at 2 Norfolk Street. Postcode is cb12lf. Their phone number is 01223474144.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the entrance fee?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I do not have information on their entrance fee, I'm sorry.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok, well thanks anyway. Can you help me find a restaurant in the centre of town also? I prefer something moderately priced.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure thing, what kind of food would you like. I have several options?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm not too picky on what kind of food as long as it is good.  Can you make a few suggestions please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Lan Hong House is Chinese food, Galleria is European style food and the Varsity Restaurant is international dining. Do any of these interest you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Galleria sounds good. Could I get the postcode for that please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: sure, the postcode is cb21uw

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you, I also need a taxi to commute between the two places.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay. Can you tell me the departure or arrival time?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like to leave the man on the moon by 04:45, can you set that up for me?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You got it! I've booked a taxi for you. It'll be a yellow ford with the contact number 07730485057

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks.  That was all I needed.  Goodbye.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: enjoy your stay!

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve christmas food and should be in the north. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food. Make sure you get phone number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat and should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get phone number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the attraction by 08:30. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are there any places that serve Christmas food? I heard there might be something like that around here.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am sorry I do not see any place that serves Christmas food.  Would you like me to look for a different type of food?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about some Chinese food?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have a lot of choices for Chinese food. What price range were you looking for? Or area?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No preference, just pick a nice one and provide me with the name and phone number please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yu Garden is excellent. Their phone number is 01223244149. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok, so their number is 01223244149? Is there any Chinese attractions around the same area as the Yu Garden?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are no Chinese attractions in town. Is there a different type of attraction that you are looking for?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: How about a boat attraction?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There is one boat attraction in the east near Yu Garden called Camboats, located at The Plough, Green End, Fen Ditton. Their number is 01223902112. Anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you book my a taxi between the two? I want to leave Camboats for Yu Garden by 8:30.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your taxi is booked and it will be a yellow tesla. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Nope, that's all I needed. Thanks so much!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Also, just in case you need it the contact number for the taxi is Contact number 07633485095. Is there anything else I can do for you today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No that is all thank you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We are happy to help. Thank you for using our service.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the centre. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 15:15 on sunday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture. Make sure you get phone number, area, and address. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for an expensive restaurant in the centre of Cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: How about Bedouin Restaurant that serves African food located on 100 Mill Road City Centre? Would you like me to book it for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes please I need a table for 6 people at 15:15 on sunday and need a reference number.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Great, I have booked your table for 6 at 15:15 on sunday, your reference number is 7B529GFP. Is there anything else I can do for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'm looking for a place to go in town. Something with interesting architecture.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 5 options in the town centre. All Saints Church is located on Jesus Lane and has free admission.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can I have the phone to it please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The phone number is 01223452587.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. I'll need a cab from the church to the restaurant that arrives by my booking time.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have you booked for a black toyota with the contact number 07701269558. Is there anything else I can assist you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great thank you that's all I needed today.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It was a pleasure assisting you. Have a wonderful day.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range. The restaurant should serve singaporean food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food. Make sure you get postcode. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get attraction type and postcode. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the restaurant by 22:15. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm looking for a restaurant in the centre of town

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are over 60 restaurants near the center of town, do you have a cuisine or price range in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, something in the affordable price range. Also, do any of them serve singaporean food?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are no Singaporean restaurants, but there are cheap ones offering several different cuisines.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay what about Italian food then?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Zizzi Cambridge serves italian cuisine in the city centre.  Would you like a reservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Not right now, but can I have their postcode, please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Their postcode is cb21ab

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. I am also looking for some places to go. Can you help with that?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have a lot of different locales and attractions in my database, is there anything you'd like to see in particular? Or search by location?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is there to see in the centre and what is the postcode?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 44 attractions in the center of town. Would you like a museum, or a cinema perhaps?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I prefer the cinema, is there one in the same postcode as the restaurant?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I only have one venue offering cinema in the centre but it has a different postcode than the restaurant. Vue Cinema's postcode is cb11ps. Should I look elsewhere for cinemas?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that one is perfect. Could you help me book a taxi please? I am looking for one to take me from Zizzi Cambridge to Vue Cinema. I'd like to leave by 22:15.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Of course. I've booked you a grey honda leaving from Zizzi Cambridge to Vue Cinema at 22:15. The contact number is 07135477113.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks, that's all I need today. Have a good one.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome. Have a nice day.
